reviews.name: M. K.
reviews.text: Die Bedienung war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, hatten zum Frühstück leckere Schinken-Käse Sandwiches, vegetarisches Baguette und knusprige Pommes, dazu einen Kaffee und Cappuccino für insgesamt knapp 1.100LEK - es war alles super, Preis/Leistung top und wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Bloß schade, dass auch drinnen geraucht werden darf, in Albanien wohl so üblich, war für uns als Nichtraucher allerdings eher ungewohnt, daher "nur" 4 Sterne beim Ambiente!
reviews.textTranslated: The service was very friendly and helpful. For breakfast, we had delicious ham and cheese sandwiches, a vegetarian baguette, and crispy fries, plus coffee and cappuccino for a total of just under 1,100 LEK – everything was great, excellent value for money, and we felt very comfortable. It's just a shame that smoking is allowed inside; apparently, it's common in Albania, but it was rather unusual for us as non-smokers, hence "only" 4 stars for the ambiance!

title: Oping's
address: Brenda Kalase se, Shëtitorja Murat Toptani, Tiranë 1001, Albania
street: Brenda Kalase se, Shëtitorja Murat Toptani

reviews.name: Zeki Taşdemir
reviews.text:
Tirana Kalesi’nin içinde yer alan Oping’s, hem konumu hem de atmosferiyle şehrin en keyifli duraklarından biri. Tarihi dokunun içinde modern ve canlı bir ortam sunuyor.
Menüde kahvaltıdan burgerlere, salatalardan atıştırmalıklara kadar geniş seçenekler var ve genel olarak lezzetler beklentiyi karşılıyor. Kokteyller de oldukça başarılı. Fiyatlar lokasyona göre biraz yüksek sayılabilir ama ortam ve deneyim bunu büyük ölçüde telafi ediyor.
Servis çoğu zaman hızlı ve personel güler yüzlü. Özellikle yoğun saatlerde biraz bekleme olsa da çalışanların ilgisi iyi.
Genel olarak hem gündüz kahvesi hem de akşam keyifli vakit geçirmek için Tirana’da kesinlikle uğranması gereken, enerjisi yüksek bir mekan.
reviews.textTranslated: Located inside Tirana Castle, Oping's is one of the city's most enjoyable spots, thanks to both its location and atmosphere. It offers a modern and vibrant environment within a historical setting. The menu has a wide range of options, from breakfast to burgers, salads to snacks, and the flavors generally meet expectations. The cocktails are also quite good. Prices might be considered a little high for the location, but the atmosphere and experience largely compensate for this. Service is often fast, and the staff are friendly. Although there might be a slight wait, especially during peak hours, the staff's attentiveness is excellent. Overall, it's a high-energy place you should definitely visit in Tirana, both for a daytime coffee and for a pleasant evening out.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Pierre Lagrange

Nouvelle adresse sur Tirana et quelle adresse.

L'ambiance est très chouette avec une déco originale ! Un choix de bière correct pour Tirana et un service très agréable
reviews.textTranslated:
New spot in Tirana, and what a spot it is!

The atmosphere is great, with original decor! A decent beer selection for Tirana and very pleasant service.

reviews.name: Łukasz Kolenderski
reviews.text: Widząc super oceny poszliśmy tam. Wszystko ok. Wystrój, klimat, obsługa. Niestety dostaliśmy stare, kwaśne, zwietrzałe piwo. Nie dało się go wypić. Skandal. Jesteśmy ogromnie rozczarowani. W takim miejscu sprzedać klientowi zepsute piwo. Ogromna rozczarowanie.
reviews.textTranslated: Seeing the great reviews, we went there. Everything was fine: the decor, the atmosphere, the service. Unfortunately, we were served an old, sour, stale beer. It was impossible to drink. It was a scandal. We were extremely disappointed. In such a place, selling a customer a spoiled beer. A huge disappointment.

reviews.name: Peter Majercsik
reviews.text: Me and my friend were just strolling the streets of Tirana, when we ran into this gem of an establishement. Impressive selection of drinks, very friendly owner and employees, highly recommended place to visit! Be prepared tho that if you dont smoke, the smoke might be a bit much for you!

updatesFromCustomers.text: In need of a pint of decent ale, I visited this place on 5 May 2023. It was closed and people were doing building work inside. I couldn’t see any notice to customers to explain what’s happening. If it is going to re-open, I guess it will be in weeks rather than days.

reviewContext.Seating type: Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Chris Wright
reviews.text: Was here yesterday with a couple of buddies. Very underrated place for sure. The food was amazing and so were the cocktails that we ordered. Atmosphere was nice with some 90s style music. Both waiters were very kind and professional. Will definitely come back 👍🏻

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Amaia Lamborena
reviews.text:
La comida no la puedo valorar, pero los mojitos para llorar.
Perdimos piña colada y nos dijo que no tenian zumo ni de coco ni de piña, que si la queríamos con zumo de naranja. Predisposición genial, pero eso NO ES UNA PIÑA COLADA.
Entonces pedimos un mojito y nos sirvió lo que en mi opinión es el peor mojito del mundo. He probado muchos en muchos países y sin duda fue el peor. Pregunté por el azucar moreno (inexistente) y me dice que le ha echado sirope de azúcar, q es lo mismo (según el amable camarero que me respondió de muy malas formas). Tuve que dejar los 680Lek ahí porque no era bebible.
reviews.textTranslated:
I can't comment on the food, but the mojitos were awful. We ordered a piña colada and they told us they didn't have any coconut or pineapple juice, and asked if we wanted it with orange juice. They were very helpful, but that's NOT A PIÑA COLADA.
So we ordered a mojito and they served us what, in my opinion, is the worst mojito in the world. I've tried many in many countries, and this was undoubtedly the worst. I asked about the brown sugar (which was nonexistent) and they told me they'd used sugar syrup, which is the same thing (according to the friendly waiter who answered me very rudely). I had to leave the 680 LEK there because it was undrinkable.

כמיטב המסורת עצרתי לעשן נרגילה בביקור בטירנה.
מקום נחמד מאוד, שקט.
בשעות הצהריים כמעט ולא היו אנשים במקום.
מבחר סוגי טבק שאת חלקם לא הכרתי.
לקח קצת זמן עד שהכינו אבל היה שווה לחכות.
מחיר סביר - 50 ש״ח ראש.
בסהכ ביקור נחמד בהשוואה למדינות אחרות שהייתי.
reviews.textTranslated:
As is tradition, I stopped to smoke a hookah while visiting Tirana.
Very nice, quiet place.
There were hardly any people there at noon.
A selection of tobacco types, some of which I was unfamiliar with.
It took a while for them to prepare it, but it was worth the wait.
Reasonable price - 50 NIS per head.
Overall, a nice visit compared to other countries I've been to.

updatesFromCustomers.text: After a day walking about Tirana I came across this bar came across this bar; it has a really cool vibe with good music and relaxed lighting.  I was by myself and the bar staff soon struck up a welcoming chat and made me feel welcome.  It's a smoking bar if that is something that you are looking for.  Highly recommended if chill, intimate, and good vibes are what you are looking for.

title: Voodoo Rock Bar & Pub
address: Boulevard, Alqi Boshnjaku, Street Gjergj Fishta, Tiranë 1001, Albania
street: Boulevard, Alqi Boshnjaku, Street Gjergj Fishta
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 1 week ago

ownerUpdates.text:
⚡ VOODOO ROCK PUB OFFICIALLY LAUNCHES ITS FIRST ONLINE FASHION STORE ⚡

After more than 6 months of designing, styling, manufacturing, and building our vision, Voodoo Rock Pub proudly announces the launch of our very first online fashion & lifestyle store.

🌐

⚡️ VOODOO ROCK PUB OPENS THE SUMMER SEASON WITH A BALKAN ROCK STORM ⚡️

On May 30th at 20:00, the walls of Voodoo Rock Pub will shake under the weight of pure live rock energy as the legendary Mirgen Huba Band ignites the stage alongside the explosive force of Conspiracy Band — the Macedonian rock thunderstorm that calls Tirana their second home.

This is not just another concert.
This is the opening strike of summer.
A night of distortion, sweat, chaos, unity, and Balkan rock spirit unleashed at full volume.

From soul-cutting vocals and screaming guitars to electrifying rhythms that hit like lightning through the crowd, expect a live show that will leave no heartbeat untouched. The atmosphere will be wild, emotional, rebellious, and unforgettable — exactly the way real rock should feel.

🔥 LIVE ROCK
🔥 BALKAN ENERGY
🔥 RAW ELECTRIC CHAOS
🔥 ONE NIGHT ONLY

📍 Tirana, Albania
🕗 Doors open: 20:00
🎟 Entry: 1000 ALL / 12€

Prepare for the slash of sound, the thunder of the Balkans, and a night where strangers become one voice under the lights of rock ‘n’ roll.
Summer begins with distortion. 🤘

🎸 Exciting News from Voodoo Rock Pub! 

We’ve expanded our menu to bring you the ultimate pairing with your favorite beers and cocktails. Whether you’re popping by solo or coming with a crew, we’ve designed something special for every gathering.
Introducing our NEW Perfect Pairing Menu! We’ve created delectable samples for every group size—from intimate bites for two, all the way up to our grand group platter that serves six or more! Indulge in crispy onion rings, golden mozzarella sticks, and juicy chicken fingers—all paired with a rainbow of sauces like honey mustard, garlic, chili, and more! &, of course, we’ve kept the prices as rock-solid as the quality—fresh ingredients!

🥃 Introducing the Rock Legend Cocktails—A VIP Experience Like No Other! 
At Voodoo Rock Pub, we believe that every sip should be a rock anthem. Our world-class bartenders—who have traveled across the globe, met rock icons in person, and mastered their craft—have brought these extraordinary cocktails to life.
Each drink is a meticulously crafted homage to a rock legend—designed not just as a beverage, but as an result is pure magic—tastes that no other bar in Albania can match.As you indulge in these iconic cocktails—or even in the VIP shot package—you aren’t just drinking; you’re immersing yourself in rock history. We are, and always will be, the one and only rock pub that dares to set the stage for these masterpieces—an elite haven where rock dreams and flavors collide.

THE VOODOO ROCK
PUB WORLD CHALLENGE 2025-2026 BEGINS!
This year, our beloved Voodoo family did something unforgettable - they carried a piece of us across borders, across oceans, across the world... and now we're turning that love into a global mission.
Show the world what Voodoo means to
YOU.
Wherever you are - another city, another country, another continent - capture your most powerful, artistic, or badass moment wearing Voodoo Rock Pub Merch. The best picture worldwide will be featured across all our socials, and the most loved one will win a special surprise Voodoo Rock Pub Gift!
This isn't just a challenge...
It's a movement.
A celebration of the people who turned a pub into a culture, a community, a family.
A tribute to the spirit we all share — the fire that never dies.
ROCK'S NOT DEAD - and now the world
will see it through YOU.
Send your pictures, mark your moment, and let's set the globe on fire with the Voodoo spirit!
Send your pictures to the official instagram of Voodoo (voodoo_rocktirana) IG, or at the pub number on whatsapp +355 696942430

reviews.name: Irene_mx29
reviews.text:
Boudou Bar

Ce bar m’avait été conseillé lorsque j’ai demandé un lieu avec beaucoup de charme et d’authenticité.

En arrivant, on aperçoit de loin les lumières rouges qui éclairent le lieu, ainsi que deux énormes statues rouges, un peu comme les gardiennes de l’entrée.

Sur la terrasse, un groupe de jeunes Français avec leurs sacs à dos et une table remplie simplement de sodas. À l’intérieur : une atmosphère totalement bohème, une scène avec des instruments… mais sans musiciens ce soir-là.

Le propriétaire, avec ses dreadlocks presque jusqu’aux pieds, était extrêmement gentil. Il m’a servi un micro-rhum — en vérité, c’était la fin de la bouteille et il n’a pas voulu ouvrir une autre bouteille juste pour moi 😄 Donc j’ai bu un micro-rhum.

Mais ce n’est pas grave, parce que ce lieu m’a tellement inspirée qu’il deviendra probablement le décor d’une scène de mon film.

Merci à eux pour leur gentillesse et leur compréhension, parce que je suis restée très tard, alors que le bar était déjà fermé, et personne ne m’a dérangée.

Comme partout à Tirana : personne ne t’embête. Et ça, c’est génial.

J’aime Tirana ❤️
reviews.textTranslated:
Boudou Bar

This bar was recommended to me when I asked for a place with lots of charm and authenticity.

Upon arrival, you can see the red lights illuminating the place from afar, as well as two enormous red statues, a bit like guardians of the entrance.

On the terrace, a group of young French people with their backpacks and a table simply laden with sodas. Inside: a totally bohemian atmosphere, a stage with instruments… but no musicians that evening.

The owner, with dreadlocks almost down to his feet, was extremely kind. He served me a small glass of rum—actually, it was the end of the bottle and he didn't want to open another one just for me 😄 So I drank a small glass of rum.

But it doesn't matter, because this place inspired me so much that it will probably become the setting for a scene in my film.

Thank you to them for their kindness and understanding, because I stayed very late, even though the bar had already closed, and nobody bothered me.

Like everywhere in Tirana: nobody bothers you. And that's fantastic.

I love Tirana ❤️

reviews.text:
Pohodový a klidný bar, kde se konečně i uslyšíte ve větší skupině lidí. Není na výběr takové množství drinků, ale zase je zde možnost si namíchat drink dle přání z výběru alkoholu v nabídce. Platba hotově.
Příjemné místo, kde se cítíte dobře.
reviews.textTranslated:
A relaxed and calm bar where you can finally be heard in a larger group of people. There is not that many drinks to choose from, but there is the possibility to mix a drink according to your wishes from the selection of alcohol on offer. Payment in cash.
A pleasant place where you feel good.

title: Mimoza Bar & Cocktails
address: Sheshi Bukureshti, Rruga Kont Urani, Tiranë 1001, Albania

reviews.name: Mona Majnik
reviews.text: Der leckerste Kaffee in Tirana! Avocado Toast und Petulla waren sehr gut. Waren schon zwei Mal hier.
reviews.textTranslated: The most delicious coffee in Tirana! The avocado toast and petulla were very good. We've been here twice already.

reviews.name: Nevena Nikolić
reviews.text: A very lovely and cozy place with exceptionally kind staff, excellent food, and great service. I truly enjoyed spending all my mornings there throughout my stay in Tirana.

reviews.text: Very good waiters, our waiter was Berton, was very nice and helped us a lot. He was really funny and kind. We would recommend this place a lot.

reviews.name: Katrina
reviews.text: Arrived when it was quiet but staff were very friendly and helpful. Golden hour cocktails were great along with their focaccia.

reviews.name: Daniela Schulth

reviews.name: Rosa Giudilli
reviews.text:
Locale molto carino, buono l’aperitivo.
Un po’ delusa dagli stuzzichini, in quanto mi hanno dato solo dei cracker.
I camerieri molto gentili, dopo l’aperitivo mi hanno offerto un amaro.
Consiglio
reviews.textTranslated:
Very nice place, good aperitif.
A little disappointed with the appetizers, as they only gave me crackers.
The waiters were very kind; after the aperitif, they offered me an amaro.
Recommendation

reviews.name: Jorda Esak

Ceny trochę poniżej europejskich, ale nie jakoś bardzo tanio. Niemniej warto choć na tego jednego, szczególnie, że bar szczyci się wykorzystaniem lokalnych składników.
reviews.textTranslated:
Brilliant drinks. We stopped in for one and stayed for another.

The prices are a bit below European standards, but not terribly cheap. Nevertheless, it's worth at least one, especially since the bar prides itself on using local ingredients.

title: Radio bar Tirana
address: Street, P.29, Rruga Ismail Qemali 1, Tiranë 1000, Albania

reviews.name: Steve C
reviews.text: I'm from USA and this place is The Place. Not trying to be glitzy..Just has a strong and comforting nostalgia vibe. There's a separate cool patio for smokers. The music is so cool...curated by a dj and not the usual stuff. It sits in the background. Try this place and say hi to Red the owner who worked in the industry in Italy before coming home to Tirana. Remember when I said this is The Place? Yeah.

reviews.text: Harikaydıı kokteyl içtik patates yedik. Fıstık ikram edildi. Balkan kokteyli içtik alkol oranı çok iyiydi. Atmosferi müziklerini çok sevdim.
reviews.textTranslated: It was amazing! We had cocktails and fries. Pistachios were served. We had a Balkan cocktail with a very good alcohol content. I loved the atmosphere and the music.

reviews.text: the waitresses were really rude, they took more money from us without giving an explanation, I paid 3 beers (that are approximately 500 leke per beer) with a 50 dollar bill and they gave me 1700 leke as change when the 3 beers were in total 15 euros. Also they made us loose our reservation because when we booked a table they didn’t tell us that we had to be at least 21 years old. I don’t recommend this place for the service and hospitality.

reviews.text: Unpleasant, rude man by the entrance

reviews.text: Wonderful night - super friendly staff - the food was great too - we had a chicken burger and stayed for the karaoke which was brilliant. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.text: Fantastic staff and great atmosphere. We drank and ate here on a Friday evening where we had a fantastic karaoke night with lots of amazing singers.

updatesFromCustomers.text: The cocktails are sooo goooood! There are many thoughts in the menu. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Flavia Basho
reviews.text: The best place it feels like home ❤️ irreplaceable.

reviews.name: Erind Shemsi
reviews.text: Very happy with the service and the drinks were extraordinary🕺💃🕺💃

reviews.name: Cherisse Vandenhoek
reviews.text:
What a fantastic hidden gem! This bar is cleverly disguised as a camera shop — such a fun concept. We felt very welcomed right away and easily got seats at the bar. It’s not too big, which gives it a lovely intimate vibe, perfect for chatting with the bartenders.
The service was mostly excellent. One waitress wasn’t very helpful when I asked for recommendations (she just told me to look at the menu), but the bartender more than made up for it. He listened to what I usually like, suggested a twist on a margarita — and it was excellent! I also had one of the best martinis I’ve ever had — it completely blew me away.
The atmosphere is spot on: great music at the perfect volume for conversation, stylish decor, and very clean bathrooms.
Highly recommend this place for cocktails and that special speakeasy feel. We’ll definitely be back!

reviews.name: Nick Baker
reviews.text:
What an amazing place to add to the whole experience the barman is in character would not let us in until we had confirmed we wanted our camera fixing 🤣🤣

Watching the barman creating his work of art is mesmerising wish we had visited earlier as we would definitely come back

I would definitely recommend this place to visit if your in town

reviews.name: Iron Dude
reviews.text: Not much to say. Everything was perfect! Friendly and competent staff. Great atmosphere and super tasty Drinks. Thx for mixing up a Rapscallion for me.

reviews.name: Jakub Korkosz
reviews.text: Great cocktails, perfect atmosphere
